recommendations.title: All Hallows' Eve 2
recommendations.overview: A woman finds a VHS tape on her doorstep that shows a series of gruesome tales that could be real. But the true danger is the pumpkin-faced killer that's using the tape to find his next victim.
recommendations.director: Jon Kondelik, Ryan Patch, Marc Roussel, Elias Benavidez, Mike Kochansky, Andrés Borghi, James Kondelik, Bryan Norton, Antonio Padovan, Jay Holben

recommendations.title: Mr. Crocket
recommendations.overview: A single mother thinks she's found the key to calming her child down – a VHS copy of a strange children's program named Mr. Crocket's World. However, a darker, bloodier secret waits to invade their home from inside the tape.

recommendations.title: Toy Story 3
recommendations.overview: Woody, Buzz, and the rest of Andy's toys haven't been played with in years. With Andy about to go to college, the gang find themselves accidentally left at a nefarious day care center. The toys must band together to escape and return home to Andy.

recommendations.title: August Underground
recommendations.overview: Imagine walking down the street and finding an unmarked VHS tape. Curiosity piqued, you take it home and pop it in. What starts off as two men screwing around with a video camera quickly transforms into an ultra-realistic torture sequence where the u

recommendations.title: Factory Girl
recommendations.overview: In the mid-1960s, wealthy debutant Edie Sedgwick meets artist Andy Warhol. She joins Warhol's famous Factory and becomes his muse. Although she seems to have it all, Edie cannot have the love she craves from Andy, and she has an affair with a charism

recommendations.title: Proof
recommendations.overview: Martin, a young blind photographer, is divided between his friendship with restaurant worker Andy and the exclusive love that Celia—who is terribly jealous of this new friendship—has for him.

recommendations.title: All Hallows' Eve
recommendations.overview: While watching two children on Halloween night, a babysitter finds an old VHS tape in the kids' trick or treat bag. The tape features three tales of terror, all linked together by a murderous clown.

recommendations.title: Maria Full of Grace
recommendations.overview: A pregnant Colombian teenager becomes a drug mule to make some desperately needed money for her family.

recommendations.title: The Invitation
recommendations.overview: Will and his new girlfriend Kira are invited to a dinner with old friends at the house of Will’s ex Eden and her new partner David. Although the evening appears to be relaxed, Will soon gets a creeping suspicion that their charming host David is up t

recommendations.title: Electrick Children
recommendations.overview: Rachel is a rambunctious girl from a polygamist colony in southern Utah. On Rachel’s 15th birthday, she finds a forbidden cassette tape. Having never seen anything like it before, Rachel plays the cassette tape, and finds glorious rock & roll thereup
